summary: First docs pass on 170-file App architecture branch. Renamed Documentation/v0.3→v0.2, updated version.txt to 0.2.1, added XML docs to 10 files (Action class, Error constructors, IContext, 7 module handlers), fixed 2 stale doc references. Architecture docs are accurate after fixes.

changes.description: Renamed from Documentation/v0.3/ — project is v0.2, not v0.3
Updated all v0.3 references to v0.2 (title, format section, builderVersion fields)
Added class-level summary for Action entity
Added docs to 4 constructors and 2 FromException factory methods
Added class-level summary with security note about skipInfrastructure
Fixed stale ExecuteAsync signature: removed non-existent app parameter
Removed stale OnErrorGoal and PreviousHash properties from Step table

findings.issue: 19 properties on Goal lack XML docs (Name, Description, Path, etc.)
findings.detail: These are Store/LlmBuilder-attributed properties. Most are self-documenting from their names and the goals-steps.md doc covers them. Low priority.

findings.issue: 9 basic interface properties (Id, Message, Key, StatusCode, etc.) lack individual XML docs
findings.detail: The interface itself is documented and the property names are self-descriptive. Adding docs would be noise per quality rules.
